calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval To Modify The Anaknialba 3 Trust
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathleen Michon, via Zoom, for Mary Alba, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel whether Brendan Alba has the capacity to consent to the modification of the Trust and if not, should a guardian ad litem be appointed to conserve his rights. Counsel points to a recently filed declaration of Brendan's father Jonathan Alba where he states that Brendan is aware of the petition and that Brendan was advised that he could appear at today's hearing. Counsel advises that she did not draft the special needs trust and at the advice of Jonathan Alba's counsel, did not ask for consent. Counsel offers additional advocacy in support of the petition and confirms that if granted, roughly $500k will flow to the special needs trust. The court reiterates counsel's testimony to confirm her position.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.
